user.title: Connect to OPNsense
user.description: Enter the base URL (no /api suffix) and an API key/secret pair from System > Access > Users.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate OPNsense
reauth_confirm.description: Your API credentials were rejected. Enter a new API key and secret.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the OPNsense API. Check the URL (e.g. http://192.168.1.1 - include http://, no /api suffix, and use http not https unless 443 is reachable).
error.insufficient_privileges: Authenticated, but that API user lacks the required privileges. Grant it API access (System: Firmware and Firewall: Aliases) or use an admin user.

abort.already_configured: This OPNsense host is already configured.

data_description.tracked_aliases: Aliases to expose as item-count sensors and enable switches, and to poll live contents for.

alias_add_host.name: Add host to alias (runtime)
alias_add_host.description: Add an IP to an alias in the live pf table immediately. Not persistent across reboot.

alias_remove_host.name: Remove host from alias (runtime)
alias_remove_host.description: Remove an IP from an alias in the live pf table. Not persistent.

alias_flush.name: Flush alias (runtime)
alias_flush.description: Flush all entries from an alias's live pf table.

alias_set_hosts.name: Set alias hosts (persistent)
alias_set_hosts.description: Replace an alias's contents with the given list and apply. Survives reboot.

addresses.name: Addresses
addresses.description: Full list of IPs the alias should contain.

alias_block_device.name: Block device (persistent)
alias_block_device.description: Add a device IP to a host alias persistently and apply. Use to block internet via the alias's GUI rule.

alias.name: Alias
alias.description: Host alias referenced by a block rule.

alias_unblock_device.name: Unblock device (persistent)
alias_unblock_device.description: Remove a device IP from a host alias persistently and apply.

alias.name: Alias
alias.description: Host alias referenced by a block rule.

toggle_rule.name: Toggle filter rule
toggle_rule.description: Enable or disable an API-created firewall rule and apply the ruleset.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the rule should be enabled.

target.name: Target
target.description: What to apply: filter ruleset, alias config, or both.

exec_api.name: Execute raw API call
exec_api.description: Advanced passthrough to the OPNsense REST API. Returns the parsed response.

alias_not_found.message: No configured OPNsense entry owns alias {alias}.

rule_not_found.message: No configured OPNsense entry owns rule {uuid}.

no_single_entry.message: This action requires exactly one configured OPNsense entry.
